sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_md5 (id UInt32, value String, hash FixedString(16)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_md5 (id, value, hash) VALUES (1, 'test_string', MD5('test_string'));
UPDATE test_md5 SET hash = MD5(value) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, value, lower(hex(hash)) AS hash_hex FROM test_md5 WHERE hash = MD5('test_string');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_md5 WHERE hash = MD5(concat(value, '_suffix'));
